# Backend server code analysis (2026-03-10 09:56Z)

_**User**_

Thoroughly explore the backend server code in this call-center application. Read ALL files in the `server/` directory (both root-level .js files and all files in `server/routes/`). 

For each file, provide:
1. Full file path and line count
2. Key functions/exports and what they do
3. Any issues you spot: duplicate logic, missing error handling, inefficient patterns, security concerns
4. Database queries used and their efficiency
5. How it integrates with Asterisk (AMI/ARI) if applicable

Be very thorough - read every file completely. Return a detailed analysis of each backend file.
